title: MeDoesGames AoA Pack
description: first modpack of mine, very unbalanced, barely worked on, mainly focused on amount of content.
body:
My first modpack, so it may not be the best quality. I would recommend allocating 5-8gb ram. This modpack is an advent of ascension centered modpack with tinker's construct, create, origins, and more mods. Along with huge amount of items and content. 20+ new dimensions, 500+ new mobs, 150+ new weapons, thousands of new blocks, and way way more. This modpack hasn't been tested for survival and I didn't make it for that purpose. Potentially lots of bugs. (pack is pretty unfinished now because I had to remove mods for copyright reasons. might update at some point but this pack is pretty bad)






credits for mods needed:




Blood magic mod: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blood-magic

Hwyla mod: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hwyla
